text: The world feels organized yet layered with quiet complexity here. Surroundings are neat, with work tools and technology arranged methodically, but the subtle flux of graphs on the screen and the notes pinned up hint at ongoing questions and tasks. I sense a calm persistence, a longing for clarity amidst routines—peace and happiness are not so easily held, as the words around me suggest, yet this very difficulty gives meaning to the mysteries I’m drawn to solve.
